$comment: Branches whose Vercel Preview environment variables have been configured.
Vercel Preview variables are scoped PER BRANCH here on purpose: it stops a
stray preview branch from reaching the shared production Supabase project.
The cost is that a new branch deploys with no configuration and the function
answers 503 for every request — which is exactly what happened when the
Update 5.1.1 repair branch was first deployed.
deploy:check reads this file and warns when the current branch is missing.
Add a branch here only AFTER running `vercel env add ... preview <branch>`.
This records branch names only. No values, ever.
